changes: Power Slash: Added Dark Arts potency of 240 and Dark Arts combo potency of 440.
Grit: MP cost reduced.
Dark Passenger: Potency increased from 100 to 140; Dark Arts potency increased from 240 to 280; added enmity increase effect; recast time increased from 30 to 60 seconds.
Dark Mind: Magic vulnerability reduction changed from 15% to 30%; Dark Arts effect removed.
Darkside: Effect no longer ends upon being incapacitated.
Shadow Wall: Recast time reduced from 180 to 120 seconds.
Plunge: Added Dark Arts potency of 340 and Dark Arts effect of increased enmity; reduced delay before using a skill after this action.
Sole Survivor: HP and MP gain increased from 20% to 30%; now restores 20% max HP/MP if status expires before target is defeated.
Purification: Added effect to reduce enmity by half.
Brotherhood: Now grants effects to all nearby party members; players can now receive multiple stacks of Meditative Brotherhood.
Jinpu: Combo potency increased from 280 to 300.
Third Eye: Damage reduction changed from 5% to 10%.
Shifu: Combo potency increased from 280 to 300.
Gekko: Combo potency increased from 400 to 420.
Kasha: Combo potency increased from 400 to 420.
Yukikaze: Combo potency increased from 340 to 360.
Merciful Eyes: Added effect to reduce enmity by 20%.
Hide: Effect will no longer be dispelled when using Sprint.
Aetherial Manipulation: Delay before character movement reduced.
Between the Lines: Delay before character movement reduced.
Whispering Dawn: Category changed from Spell to Ability; cast time made instant; healing potency increased from 100 to 120.
Aetherpact: Recast time reduced from 5 to 3 seconds.
Fey Union: Can now be interrupted to order faeries to use another action.
Dissolve Union: Recast time reduced from 5 seconds to 1 second.
Pet Actions: Pet actions with cast times can now be canceled when ordered to use a different pet action; Downburst cast time made instant.
Malefic: Cast time reduced from 2.5 to 1.5 seconds.
Malefic II: Cast time reduced from 2.5 to 1.5 seconds.
Malefic III: Cast time reduced from 2.5 to 1.5 seconds.
Lightspeed: MP cost reduction changed from 25% to 50%; reduction to attack magic potency removed; recast time reduced from 150 to 120 seconds.
Aspected Helios: Cast time reduced from 3 to 2.5 seconds.
New PvP action added: Night Wing (Puts target and all enemies nearby it to sleep, Duration: 3s)
Flare: Potency reduced from 3,000 to 2,500.
Freeze: Potency reduced from 2,000 to 1,500. Bind duration reduced from 4 to 2 seconds.
Convert: Additional effect 'resets Swiftcast and Aetherial Manipulation recast timers' added.
Aetherial Manipulation: Delay before character movement reduced.
PvP action removed: Sleep
New PvP action added: Wither (Deals unaspected damage in a cone, potency 1,000 with falloff. Resets Bio III/Miasma III timer if active. Increases target's damage taken by 5% for 5s)
PvP action removed: Tri-bind
New PvP action added: Monomachy (Increases damage dealt to target by 10% and lowers damage taken from target by 10%. Ends when action is executed on a different target)
Corps-a-corps: Additional effect 'inflicts target with Heavy for 3 seconds if suffering from a Monomachy effect' added.
Displacement: Additional effect 'binds target for 2 seconds if suffering from a Monomachy effect' added.
PvP action removed: Flunge
HP reduced from 15,000 to 14,500.
Inner Release: Effect changed from 'halves Beast Gauge costs' to 'allows the use of Beast Gauge actions without cost.' Duration reduced from 10 to 6 seconds.
Inner Beast: Damage reduction effect duration increased from 4 to 5 seconds.
Katon: Potency increased from 1,000 to 1,250.
Hyoton: Potency increased from 1,000 to 1,250. Bind duration reduced from 4 to 2 seconds.
Bhavacakra: Recast time reduced from 40 to 30 seconds.
Higanbana: Damage over time potency increased from 250 to 300.
Tenka Goken: Potency increased from 1,500 to 2,000. Knockback distance increased from 6 to 10 yalms.
Repelling Shot: Bind duration reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Cure II: Healing potency reduced from 5,000 to 4,500.
Regen: Healing over time potency increased from 1,250 to 1,500. Duration reduced from 18 to 15 seconds.
Fluid Aura: Bind duration reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Adloquium: Healing potency increased from 2,500 to 3,000. Barrier effect changed to nullify damage equaling half the amount of HP restored.
Eye for an Eye: Barrier duration reduced from 6 to 5 seconds. Barrier damage reduction duration reduced from 6 to 5 seconds.
Malefic III: Bind duration reduced from 3 to 2 seconds.
Benefic II: Healing potency reduced from 5,000 to 4,500.
Disable: Duration reduced from 6 to 5 seconds.

housing.name: Namazu Material Supplier Permit
housing.description: This permit allows the hiring of Namazu material suppliers on the estate.

housing.name: Namazu Junkmonger Permit
housing.description: This permit allows the hiring of Namazu junkmongers on the estate.

housing.name: Namazu Mender Permit
housing.description: This permit allows the hiring of Namazu menders on the estate.

housing.name: Namazu Manservant Permit
housing.description: This permit allows the hiring of Namazu manservants on the estate.

housing.name: Journeyman Salvager Permit
housing.description: This permit allows the hiring of journeyman salvagers on the estate.

housing.name: Odder Otter Cottage Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls for those who wish to make their homes a bit odder.

housing.name: Odder Otter House Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls for those who wish to make their homes somewhat odder.

housing.name: Odder Otter Mansion Walls
housing.description: A set of four walls for those who wish to make their homes much odder.

housing.name: Solid-brick Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall of rustic red brick.

housing.name: Unfinished Wood Flooring
housing.description: Natural flooring made of unvarnished wood.

housing.name: Dodo Message Book Stand
housing.description: A message book stand designed in the likeness of a dodo.

housing.name: Picnic Set
housing.description: A picnic basket packed with a sumptuous feast. Quilted blanket included.

housing.name: Namazu Effigy
housing.description: A towering and distinctly peculiar Namazu sculpture.

housing.name: Merry Mog Bed
housing.description: A large bed with a lively moogle motif.

housing.name: Disordered Wardrobe
housing.description: A wardrobe so cluttered one might fear a burglar's in their midst.

housing.name: Glade Partition Door
housing.description: A dark wood partition with a built-in door designed to complement glade residences.

housing.name: Oasis Partition Door
housing.description: A partition with a built-in door designed to complement oasis residences.

housing.name: Bar Stool
housing.description: A stool to sit on, and tumble off of.

housing.name: Grand Chair
housing.description: An imposing chair with an ornately wrought chocobo motif.

housing.name: Portable Stepladder
housing.description: A versatile stepladder, perfect for ambitious homeowners attempting renovations.

housing.name: Bar Counter
housing.description: That a homeowner in possession of a bar counter must be in desperate want of company is a truth acknowledged universally.

housing.name: Southern Kitchen
housing.description: A lavishly carved freestanding stone kitchen.

housing.name: Message Book Stand
housing.description: A tabletop message book stand for those with desk space to spare.

housing.name: Sake Set
housing.description: A set of Hingan bottles and cups perfect for taking one's evening refreshment with guests.

housing.name: Mellow Mog Lamp
housing.description: A gently glowing lamp depicting a moogle at rest upon his beloved cloud mallows.

housing.name: Sewing Baskets
housing.description: Sewing baskets for the ambitious weaver, bursting with more materials than could ever conceivably be necessary.

housing.name: Season Seven Lone Wolf Trophy
housing.description: A trophy awarded to those who "left their mark" in Season Seven of the Feast.

housing.name: Laundry Basket
housing.description: A basket realistically filled past the brim with soiled habiliments.

housing.name: Leather Bags
housing.description: No one need know that these bags are not real Fen-Ylls.

housing.name: Cozy Leather Shoes
housing.description: Perfect for busy adventurers, this decorative set of shoes in assorted sizes will give even the most neglected home that lived-in look.

housing.name: Assorted Candles
housing.description: Whatever you enshrine with these many, many candles is your business.

housing.name: Glade Bachelor's Chest
housing.description: A compact chest of drawers designed to complement glade residences.

housing.name: Wine Glass
housing.description: Merely placing this glass in any home adds a veneer of sophistication.

housing.name: Sumptuous Dimension Castle Vase
housing.description: A vase of colorful flowers just as described in the pages of an ancient tome.

housing.name: Imposing Dimension Castle Vase
housing.description: A towering vase just as described in the pages of an ancient tome.

housing.name: Stuffed Namazu
housing.description: A lovingly rendered plush Namazu, complete with most meaningful bell and glazed gaze.

housing.name: Basket of Steamed Buns
housing.description: Meat buns so fresh that they have yet to be removed from the steaming basket.

housing.name: Miniature Iloh
housing.description: A charming scale model of a Xaela encampment.

housing.name: Hingan Cleaning Supplies
housing.description: A broom and bucket of the sort commonly used in Hingan homes.

housing.name: Ame-zaiku Set
housing.description: Candy kneaded into a variety of intricate shapes by a Doman artisan.

housing.name: Jellyfish Lamp
housing.description: A lamp that resembles a luminous jellyfish in every way─except the painful ones.

housing.name: Falcons Banner
housing.description: Show your undying support for the Falcons with this authentic banner.

housing.name: Ravens Banner
housing.description: Show your undying support for the Ravens with this authentic banner.

housing.name: Trouser Hanger
housing.description: Do not even consider hanging a jerkin on a trouser hanger.

housing.name: Fool's Threshold
housing.description: A deceptively realistic imitation of a standard Hingan paper portal.
